notes: Converted from the old chapter extraction schema.
Hidden facts, motives, and faction pressures require living-world re-extraction.
Merged second-stage living-world enrichment; still requires expert/manual review.

Source directly supports that Fang Yuan (disguised as Liu Guanyi) has the private motive of defeating and annexing Yelu Qunxing's star path blessed land. This is internal knowledge known only to Fang Yuan, not to other characters. The fact is atomic and source-backed.
Merged second-stage living-world enrichment; still requires expert/manual review.

ptr_14 directly states: '方源暗想：我正是因为此人，才动身前来。星道福地，正适合我吞并。' This is a direct internal thought showing motive to defeat and swallow the star path blessed land. observedMotive and inferredMotive are both directly supported by this seed fact.
Merged second-stage living-world enrichment; still requires expert/manual review.

insufficient source-backed seed: The seed primarily focuses on individual-level conflicts (楚度 vs 耶律群星, 方源 vs 耶律群星) and individual arrivals (柳贯一). While 楚门 is mentioned as a faction (楚门大长老, 楚门蛊仙, 楚门太上二长老), the pressures described are individual combat challenges and personal grudges, not collective faction-level pressures. 耶律群星 is an individual enemy, not a faction. 药家/关家/努尔家 are named as family affiliations of individuals but no collective stake or pressure is shown. No clear faction-level interest, threat, resource, reputation, geography, succession, or inheritance pressure with source backing.
IF export filter quarantined 6 legacy old-schema branches.
